title: Papersided
description: Papersided is a EXTREMELY small collection of 5 mods, I didn't add any settings so you can customize it to your likings.
body:
# Quick Summary

Papersided is a EXTREMELY small collection of 4-5 mods, I didn't add any settings so you can customize it to your likings. You can add more mods if you want to, this is like Simply Optimized but with less mods if that's what you want. This is a fabric based modpack, I do not plan to port anything to forge. My plan is to keep it as minimalistic as possible so you can add your own tweaks without having 20 to 50 mods used for only optimization.


1.16.5 doesn't support Starlight


## LIST OF MODS

- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)

- [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium)

- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)

- [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)

- [Starlight](https://modrinth.com/mod/starlight)
